In June 2024, the major AI chip company that announced a 10-for-1 stock split was **NVIDIA**.

NVIDIA, a leading manufacturer of AI chips and graphics processing units (GPUs), made the announcement as part of its strategy to make its stock more accessible to retail investors. A 10-for-1 stock split means that for every 1 share an investor owned, they would receive 10 new shares. This type of split does not change the company's market capitalization but can increase liquidity and make the stock more affordable for smaller investors.

This move was widely seen as a sign of confidence in NVIDIA's future growth, especially given its dominant position in the AI and data center markets.
